system.flavor: At your strike, a serpentine arc of crimson flame whips along the ground, then erupts beneath its targets.
system.effect:
Attack: 1 damage. Hit: +1d3 damage
Area effect: 1 damage
On hit dangerous terrain under all characters in the effect area. Deals damage [+] to characters already in dangerous terrain.
Effect you are bloodied, increase arc by +2, or +4 if you are in crisis.
